items.name: Sharu-873
items.description: Welcome to my GitHub! 🚀 I’m passionate about Data Analysis, Machine Learning, and Artificial Intelligence, with strong skills in Python, SQL, Data Visualization, and ML frameworks.

items.name: volatility-forecasting-thesis
items.description: Hybrid econometric and machine learning framework for volatility forecasting in the Tehran Stock Exchange under different market regimes. Includes GARCH-based benchmarks, regime-switching models, and ML methods such as Random Forest, XGBoost, and LSTM with macro-financial feature engineering and backtesting evaluation.

items.name: BioGraphX
items.description: BioGraphX is a comprehensive framework for extracting biophysical features from protein sequences using graph-theoretical approaches. The system models proteins as interaction networks where residues form nodes and biochemical interactions form edges, enabling sophisticated feature extraction for downstream machine learning applications

items.name: Diabetes-Complication-Risk-Prediction-Model
items.description: A machine learning project that predicts diabetes-related complications such as cardiovascular disease, kidney disease, and neuropathy using patient clinical data. The project includes data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, exploratory data analysis, and a multi-label classification framework.

items.name: tensorflow
items.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

items.name: Chromasight-AI-Powered-solution-for-color-blindness
items.description: ChromaSight is an AI-powered assistive framework designed to provide instant visual accessibility for individuals with color vision deficiency. By bridging the gap between advanced machine learning and practical accessibility solutions, this project empowers users to achieve greater independence in their daily lives.

items.name: Metric-Compatibility
items.description: This repository contains the source code and supplementary materials for the paper "A Game-Theoretic Framework for Measuring and Explaining Metric Compatibility in Fair Machine Learning" (ICML 2026).

items.name: pontos
items.description: 🛠️ Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.

items.name: Ignis
items.description: 🔥 Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.

items.name: IntegratedPipeline-Specialized-Non-LLM-AI-Agent-Framework
items.description: [~]  IntegratedPipeline is a standalone AI Agent Library for memory Augmented Agentic Framework, Specifically designed to provide Agentic capability for any Autonomous Agentic Framework locally and Coordinatively that runs efficiently on Consumer based machine to High end embedded systems, While continuously learning and runs efficiently.

items.name: w5-football-prediction
items.description: ⚽ Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.

items.name: vnpy-Machine-Learning
items.description: vnpy-Machine-Learning: Secure money manager and Quantitative-Trading tool. Integrates Machine-Learning models with the vn.py framework for AI-driven trading.

items.name: waqarahmed.xyz
items.description: Hi there! I'm Waqar, a passionate Full Stack Developer, DevOps Engineer, and Machine Learning enthusiast currently exploring the world of Agentic AI. I specialize in building intelligent, scalable, and automated systems using modern tools and frameworks — from infrastructure to intelligent apps.

items.name: Feature-Engineering-Framework-For-Traffic-Accident-Prediction-using-XAI
items.description: 🚦 Predict traffic accident severity using advanced machine learning and explainable AI, enhancing road safety with clear insights from comprehensive data analysis.

items.name: awesome-QAI-Papers-QML
items.description: 📚 Discover key research papers on Quantum Machine Learning (QML) and explore transfer learning frameworks, applications, and optimization strategies.

items.name: warp
items.description: A Python framework for GPU-accelerated simulation, robotics, and machine learning.

items.name: Hybrid-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive research and educational framework for exploring hybrid AI systems that combine machine learning with symbolic reasoning.

items.name: Streamlit
items.description: Streamlit Complete Reference Notes Streamlit is an open-source Python framework for building interactive web apps for data science and machine learning — with no front-end experience required. You write pure Python, and Streamlit renders the UI in a browser. Every time a user interacts with a widget, the script reruns from top to bottom.

items.name: NeuroAI
items.description: This study proposes a machine learning framework using EEG data to classify stress and relaxation states. EEG signals are preprocessed to remove noise and segmented for analysis. A CNN model is developed for accurate classification, while Grad-CAM provides interpretability, helping understand neural responses.

items.name: BaTiO3-ML-Property-Prediction
items.description: Multi-Model Machine Learning Framework for Predicting Material Properties of BaTiO3-Based Ferroelectric Ceramics

items.name: Cassette2Vec
items.description: Machine learning framework for Enterococcus cecorum pathogenicity prediction (Antimicrobial Resistance + genomic islands + pangenome)

items.name: bio-insight-agent
items.description: An LLM-driven Multi-Agent framework for automated bioinformatics analysis. Integrates WGCNA, machine learning, and self-reflecting code execution to streamline gene identification and regulatory network building

items.name: fucking-awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software. With repository stars⭐ and forks🍴

items.name: Conversation-Bot
items.description: A simple AI-powered voice chatbot built entirely with Python and NumPy. The project, accepts both text and speech input, and responds using text-to-speech. It is a great beginner-friendly project for understanding natural language processing, speech recognition, and neural networks without using heavy machine learning frameworks.

items.name: A-Comparative-Study-of-Global-and-Bangladeshi-Student-Dropout-Prediction-Using-Machine-Learning
items.description: Machine learning-based student dropout prediction framework comparing global (Kaggle) and local (Bangladesh) datasets. Includes feature engineering, SHAP-based explainability, ensemble models, and an early-warning system for academic interventions.

items.name: ml-framework-comparison
items.description: This project is my hands-on portfolio to deepen understanding of machine learning and deep learning pipelines.

items.name: DJIA-Smart-Beta-ML
items.description: Machine Learning framework for Smart-Beta allocation on the Dow Jones Industrial Average (2007-2026). Comparison of Ridge, Lasso, XGBoost, and Random Forest models vs DJITR benchmark.

items.name: AI2026
items.description: An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

items.name: equity-alpha-signal-ml
items.description: Machine learning equity alpha signal framework with ensemble models, LSTM walk-forward validation, and transaction-cost-aware backtesting.

items.name: SutraML
items.description: SutraML is an end-to-end machine learning toolkit for preprocessing, automated EDA, feature engineering, feature selection, outlier handling, and hyperparameter tuning, designed to simplify scalable ML workflows for data scientists and ML engineers.

items.name: Deep_LearningProject
items.description: An end-to-end deep learning project demonstrating the design and deployment of neural network models for real-world applications. Covers data preprocessing, model architecture, training, and evaluation using industry-standard frameworks, highlighting practical expertise in AI, machine learning, and scalable model development.

items.name: ML-Infastructure
items.description: An educational machine learning framework built on Python 3.14.4, numpy, matplotlib, and pytest.

items.name: zenml
items.description: ZenML is an open-source MLOps and LLMOps framework that unifies machine learning and generative AI workflows through a single orchestration, versioning, and governance layer.

items.name: streamlit
items.description: Streamlit is an open-source Python framework that makes it easy to build and share beautiful, custom web apps for machine learning and data science. With Streamlit, you can turn data scripts into shareable web applications in minutes without needing front-end experience.

items.name: scalable-inference-serving
items.description: A collection of APIs, frameworks, and platforms for scalable machine learning model inference serving, deployment, and management.

items.name: pytorch
items.description: APIs and resources for PyTorch, an open source machine learning framework for tensor computation and deep learning developed by Meta.

items.name: amazon-emr
items.description: Amazon EMR is a cloud big data platform for running large-scale distributed data processing jobs, interactive SQL queries, and machine learning applications using open-source analytics frameworks such as Apache Spark, Apache Hive, Apache HBase, Apache Flink, Apache Hudi, and Presto.

items.name: dsr-feature-eng-ml
items.description: Machine learning model evaluation and feature engineering framework with hyperparameter tuning, data balancing, and feature importance analysis.

items.name: DDoS-Guard-Optimizing-Machine-Learning-Detection-via-Advanced-Data-Preprocessing
items.description: This project evaluates how data preprocessing improves machine learning detection of DDoS attacks using the CIC-DDoS2019 dataset (50M+ records). A four-stage framework enhances accuracy and efficiency, comparing Random Forest, XGBoost, k-NN, Naïve Bayes, and SVM to achieve near-perfect detection in complex networks.

items.name: machine_learning_activities
items.description: Machine Learning assignments and experiments including data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, optimization, and explainability techniques using Python and deep learning frameworks.

items.name: MarellaReliabilityModel
items.description: Marella Reliability Model (MRM)—an AI-driven framework designed to improve reliability in multi-cloud financial systems. It focuses on moving from reactive monitoring to predictive observability, enabling organizations to detect issues early, automate incident response, and optimize cloud costs. The approach combines SRE, machine learning, FinOps

items.name: NFL-Expert-Bias-Mitigation
items.description: A machine learning framework for fantasy football forecasting that mitigates cognitive bias in player rankings using pure XGBoost algorithmic modeling and statistical benchmarking.

items.name: tvm
items.description: Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework

items.name: ReGEN-TAD
items.description: ReGEN-TAD is an interpretable generative framework that integrates modern machine learning with econometric diagnostics for anomaly detection in high-dimensional time series.

items.name: Physics-Informed-GPR-Biogas-Yield-Prediction-From-Organic-Waste
items.description: A machine learning framework that predicts biogas yield from organic waste by integrating biochemical and thermodynamic principles — Monod kinetics, Arrhenius temperature dependence, and pH-activity relations — into a Gaussian Process Regression model, achieving R² of 0.968 with only 120 samples.

items.name: Paddle
items.description: PArallel Distributed Deep LEarning: Machine Learning Framework from Industrial Practice （『飞桨』核心框架，深度学习&机器学习高性能单机、分布式训练和跨平台部署）

items.description: AI-powered career guidance system built with Django REST Framework and machine learning.

items.name: Biomarker-Identification-in-Cholangiocarcinoma
items.description: A Hybrid Feature Selection Framework for Biomarker Identification in Cholangiocarcinoma Using Gene Expression Data and Machine Learning

items.name: A-Data-Driven-Machine-learning-Framework-for-Predection-Hashimoto-Thyroiditis-
items.description: Developed a deep learning-based Handwritten Digit Recognition system using CNN in Python and Jupyter Notebook. The project trains a neural network on image datasets to accurately recognize handwritten digits and provides predictions through a user-friendly interface. Technologies used include TensorFlow/Keras, NumPy, Matplotlib, and OpenCV.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: tensorflow-federated
items.description: An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

items.name: Muscle-Fatigue-Analysis-ML
items.description: Computational framework integrating mathematical modeling, statistical analysis, and machine learning for muscle fatigue prediction and exercise optimization.

items.name: ModelingToolkit.jl
items.description: An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

items.name: 7G-Handover-Prediction
items.description: Machine Learning-driven proactive handover prediction framework for 7G Non-Terrestrial Networks(NTN).

items.name: SonraML
items.description: A Backend-Agnostic Machine Learning Framework for .NET

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.description: A Multi-Operator Equivariant Framework for High-Performance Machine Learning Force Fields, supporting External Fields embedding and Physical Tensors prediction.

items.description: A real-time, hybrid Graph Neural Network (GNN) and machine learning framework to detect organized fraud rings and synthetic identities in mobile money ecosystems. Features a dynamic transaction graph, PyTorch Geometric, Neo4j, and a FastAPI backend

items.name: ProteasAI-HIV
items.description: In this approach, we developed ProteaseAI-HIV, a comprehensive multimodal artificial intelligence framework with six complementary descriptor classes, integrated with classical machine learning, deep learning, and ensemble meta-learning strategies, to predict HIV-1 protease cleavage sites using experimentally validated octameric substrates.

items.description: End-to-end monitoring framework that tracks machine learning model performance in production, detects data and concept drift using statistical tests, and surfaces alerts when model retraining is required.

items.description: Research framework for analyzing calibration collapse under class imbalance in tabular machine learning, with adaptive calibration methods, stress-test benchmarks, and minority reliability evaluation.

items.name: sagemaker-distribution
items.description: A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

items.name: Image-Background-Replacement-using-Machine-Learning
items.description: This project aims to provide a solution for automatic Image background removal and replacement using basic HTML, CSS, Java Script for the frontend. Python based framework such as Flask for the Backend. On machine learning part it uses Rembg library based on the U2-Net architecture for background removal.

items.name: awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software.

items.name: Quantum-cryptomining-detection
items.description: Quantum-Enhanced Explainable AI framework for detecting cryptomining malware in cloud environments using Machine Learning, behavioral analysis, and Streamlit dashboard visualization.

items.name: Survivorship-cancer
items.description: This AI framework predicts cancer survivorship using clinical healthcare data. The system trains multiple machine learning models, deploying the best performer via a hospital-style dashboard. Medical staff can input patient parameters to receive instant predictions and analytics, transforming complex clinical data into actionable insights.

items.name: agentsciml
items.description: Multi-agent evolutionary framework for automated scientific machine learning discovery

items.name: unified-network-attack-detection
items.description: Machine learning-based unified framework for detecting and analyzing multiple network attack patterns using the CICIDS2017 dataset and Streamlit dashboard.

items.name: metro-delay-prediction
items.description: A machine learning framework to predict Hyderabad Metro train delays using GTFS schedule data, realistic delay simulation, operational insights, and cross-validation on Indian Railways data.

items.name: paxml
items.description: Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.

items.name: Volta
items.description: A Rust powered PyTorch-like Machine Learning framework.

items.name: SIRT1_ML_NPASS
items.description: An integrative machine learning, explainable AI, and molecular simulation framework for the discovery of selective SIRT1 inhibitors against Triple Negative Breast Cancer

items.description: BST-based hyperparameter optimization framework with transfer learning analysis across datasets, built using custom data structures and machine learning pipelines.

items.name: tradingsystem
items.description: Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

items.name: Fire-Detection-Using-a-Hybrid-Deep-Learning-and-Machine-Learning-Approach
items.description: Wildfire detection was improved using hybrid deep learning and machine learning models. DenseNet121 + SVM achieved the highest accuracy of 97.98%, followed by InceptionV3 + SVM with 97.87%. The proposed framework provides accurate, reliable, and scalable wildfire detection for real-time monitoring and early warning systems.

items.name: FW_XFL
items.description: The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

items.name: MLAgent
items.description: AI-driven Automated Machine Learning Framework for Materials Science

items.name: A-Physics-Informed-Framework-for-Hardness-Design-and-Validation-in-Multi-Principal-Element-Alloys
items.description: Physics-informed machine learning framework for hardness prediction in multi-principal element alloys (MPEAs), integrating descriptor engineering, SHAP explainability, inverse alloy design, and FEM-based Vickers indentation validation for reproducible, interpretable, and accelerated alloy discovery.

items.name: nnpdf
items.description: An open-source machine learning framework for global analyses of parton distributions.

items.name: seaport-eta-hybrid-ml
items.description: A hybrid machine learning framework for high-accuracy prediction of vessels’ Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA) in seaports, integrating Extra Trees, AutoGluon Tabular, and LightGBM with Random Forest Regressor meta-learner, utilizing AIS data from the Baltic Sea.

items.name: ML-From-Scratch
items.description: A comprehensive repository of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms, implemented from scratch using NumPy and Python. This project focuses on the underlying mathematical frameworks—including optimization techniques and loss functions—without relying on high-level libraries like Scikit-Learn.

items.name: Triangle-AI
items.description: Triangle AI is a distributed machine learning framework for detecting file-based malware (PDF, SWF, Doc, Html).

items.name: The-Lord-of-The-Words-The-two-frameworks
items.description: Translation exploration with Transformers and Machine Learning Experimentation Platfroms

items.name: CognitiveEngine
items.description: Cognitive Engine is a modular AI agent framework for building intelligent, decision-driven systems. It combines rule-based logic, machine learning, and large language models (LLMs) to enable adaptable and extensible agents across multiple domains.

items.name: NeuralReceiver
items.description: This repository offers a framework for training machine-learning‑based receivers that operate within the physical layer (PHY) of 5G‑style communication systems. The neural receiver replaces three conventional PHY blocks—channel estimation, equalization, and (optionally) demapping—into a single model.

items.name: ml-slope-stability-laterite
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting monsoon-induced slope failures in lateritic terrain using Monte Carlo data augmentation, PCA, and ensemble methods. Companion code for Geosciences 2026 paper.

items.name: hikari
items.description: Productionized machine learning pipeline and codebase for the HIKARI-HIMARI-MACHI project. Contains the model architecture, training notebooks, and deployment framework for complaint analysis.
